featureFlags.title: Feature Flags
featureFlags.subtitle: AB Testing
featureFlags.description: Create and manage feature flags with group-specific overrides.
featureFlags.noteExplanation: The "Enabled" switch and the flag's "Value" serve different purposes:
featureFlags.noteValueDesc: This is what actually controls the feature behavior for users. For example, if a boolean flag's value is "true", the feature is active for users; if "false", it's inactive.
featureFlags.noteEnabledDesc: This determines whether you (the admin) have control over this flag. When enabled, your configured value takes effect. When disabled, the flag is ignored and the application falls back to whatever default behavior the developer coded into the software — you have no control.
featureFlags.noteSummary: In short: "Value" = what happens for users. "Enabled" = whether your configuration is in control or the developer's hardcoded default is.
featureFlags.keyDescription: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only (max 16 chars)
featureFlags.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the feature flag
featureFlags.deleteOverridesWarning: This flag has {count} override(s) that will also be deleted.

workstation.breakdownInterrupted: The breakdown stream was interrupted — reload to see its result.
workstation.breakdownDoneToast: {count, plural, =0 {Breakdown complete — all entities matched} one {Breakdown complete — # new entity} other {Breakdown complete — # new entities}}
workstation.shotsReadOnlyHint: Read-only preview from the script breakdown — shot generation arrives with the Shots panel.
workstation.noComments: No comments yet — switch to comment mode and click an entity or a script line.
workstation.commentThreadsHere: {count, plural, one {# comment thread} other {# comment threads}}
workstation.staleInSubtree: A variation of this entity is stale — open it to republish
workstation.restoredToLifted: v{version} assets restored to lifted assets
workstation.elementMintFailed: Version published, but minting the element failed

shotsPanel.noShots: Run the script breakdown to create shots, or add one below.
shotsPanel.promptPlaceholder: Write the detailed AI generation prompt for this shot…
shotsPanel.draftDiffers: Draft differs from the latest version
shotsPanel.insertPromptHint: Drop this shot's AI prompt into the canvas chat
shotsPanel.noPromptYet: Write or generate a prompt first.
shotsPanel.unpublishedBody: {names} has no published version yet — its references may be missing from the generation. Continue anyway?
shotsPanel.shotZoneMissing: This shot has no canvas zone yet (open the Stills tab to set it up).
shotsPanel.noVersionedEntities: Linked entities have no published versions yet.
shotsPanel.willPublishDraft: The current draft will be published as a new version.
